```mjs title=main.mjs
import { __rspack_context } from "./runtime.mjs";
import * as __rspack_external_fs from "fs";

// NAMESPACE OBJECT: ./reexport-external.js
var reexport_external_namespaceObject = {};
__rspack_context.N(reexport_external_namespaceObject);
var reexport_external_namespaceObject_starExports = __rspack_external_fs;
Object.keys(reexport_external_namespaceObject_starExports).forEach(function(key) {
  if (key !== "default" && key !== "__esModule") {
    __rspack_context.d(reexport_external_namespaceObject, { [key]: function() { return reexport_external_namespaceObject_starExports[key]; } });
  }
});


// fs

// ./reexport-external.js


// ./index.js


it("should export a namespace for an internal module that star-reexports an external", async () => {
  const mod = await import(/* webpackIgnore: true */ "./main.mjs");

  expect(typeof mod.fsNs.readFile).toBe("function");
  expect(typeof mod.fsNs.readFileSync).toBe("function");
});

export { reexport_external_namespaceObject as fsNs };

```

```mjs title=runtime.mjs
// The require scope
var __rspack_require = {};
var __rspack_context = {};

// rspack/runtime/define_property_getters
var definePropertyGetters = (exports, getters, values) => {
	var define = (defs, kind) => {
		for(var key in defs) {
			if(hasOwnProperty(defs, key) && !hasOwnProperty(exports, key)) {
				Object.defineProperty(exports, key, { enumerable: true, [kind]: defs[key] });
			}
		}
	};
	define(getters, "get");
	define(values, "value");
};;
__rspack_context.d = definePropertyGetters;
// rspack/runtime/has_own_property
var hasOwnProperty = (obj, prop) => (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(obj, prop));
// rspack/runtime/make_namespace_object
// define __esModule on exports
var makeNamespaceObject = (exports) => {
	if(typeof Symbol !== 'undefined' && Symbol.toStringTag) {
		Object.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: 'Module' });
	}
	Object.defineProperty(exports, '__esModule', { value: true });
};;
__rspack_context.N = makeNamespaceObject;

export { __rspack_context };

```
